## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Growth X's content generation process and potential improvements for Strapi's content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growth X is updating their research process to improve brief quality and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Strapi can provide more context and specific resources to guide article creation](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Image generation and localization capabilities are being explored for future implementation](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=2398.0)
  - [Integration with Kappa.ai for fact-checking and leveraging Strapi's documentation is planned](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)

## Topics

### Growth X's Content Generation Process

  - [Uses a multi-step workflow including brief creation, research, outline generation, and draft writing](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Leverages AI tools like Claude 3.7 and perplexity for content creation and research](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [Allows for human intervention and customization at various stages](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Includes SEO analysis, fact-checking, and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

### Improvements for Strapi's Content Strategy

  - [Adding a blacklist for specific URLs (e.g., /ecosystem) to exclude from research and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Implementing ability to add resource links for specific content to guide article creation](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Expanding company and user context fields in Airtable for better brief generation](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Exploring integration with Kappa.ai for improved fact-checking using Strapi's documentation](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)

### Image Generation

  - [Growth X can create custom image styles using tools like recraft.ai](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=2398.0)
  - [Strapi team to provide reference images for developer-friendly, on-brand visuals](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=2603.0)
  - [Potential for generating both cover images and in-article visuals](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=2398.0)

### Localization and Translation

  - [Discussed potential for creating a multi-language overview page as a starting point](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
  - [Exploring full localization capabilities, considering URL structure and internal linking challenges](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=3087.0)
  - [Potential collaboration on content about handling localization at scale with Strapi and AI](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=3245.0)

### Future Developments

  - [Growth X is developing an internal platform to replace Airtable and AirOps for improved client access](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=2973.0)
  - [Exploring ingestion of video transcripts as knowledge sources for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=3333.0)
  - [Considering podcast-to-article repurposing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=3488.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Strapi team to provide blacklist URLs for content exclusion](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Growth X to implement resource link input in the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Strapi to send reference images for developer-friendly visual style](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=2603.0)
  - [Explore creation of a multi-language overview page as a localization test](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
  - [Growth X to follow up with Strapi team and Andre on discussed improvements](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)
  - [Consider collaboration on content about AI-powered localization at scale](https://fathom.video/share/nBZ_P5XDKobygA4E8jJo2xHLWofYBqtS?tab=summary&timestamp=3245.0)
